segments.text: From invisible to unforgettable. Let's do branding in 60 seconds. You've got a brilliant idea, brilliant product, but now you need to enter the market. You
need an identity, something that captures your essence. So you explore,
research, and try different element. And then when you land on it, a curved minimal mark, something that whispers trust, creativity, and exploration.
Exactly what you want to communicate.
But there is something missing. It feels dull and incomplete. This is where the magic happens. So we have this ocean inspired color palette. Perfect for a travel brand. It has Karolina blue,
flickering sea and midnight blue. These shades invoke feeling of trust, energy and exploration. So they perfectly go with what the brand wants to
communicate. So finally with color the mark transform and it finally feels right. But this is still not feeling alive. So you add animation. Subtle
